summary.shape_sentence: Early upside auction failed, converted into long bear-trend session with midday grind lower, brief 2 PM retest, and selloff finishing on the lows.

goat.note: standout lower-high rejection under red cloud; continuation point for broader bear structure

locations.context: minor bounce failure, continuation to lows

green_circles.follow_through_quality: low — tactical bounces not structural reversals

orange_banks_supply.note: hard cap, produced HOD and opening failure

blue_banks_demand.note: late afternoon cluster, tagged repeatedly then failed
final pocket, gave way into close

time_markers.10am_blue: transition from early bullish attempt to bearish control; price already failing from supply stack, accelerated lower around marker
time_markers.12pm_red: inside weak drifting bear-flag; no reversal, price pinned under cloud, resumed lower shortly after
time_markers.2pm_green: best afternoon rebound but only retested orange-bank supply 24905-24915; rejection set up cleanest late-day sell sequence
time_markers.4pm_yellow: closed near session low, no meaningful reversal, sellers retained control into bell

takeaway: Useful failed-up-open then trend-down continuation reference day. Key tell: market's inability to reclaim supply after opening reversal — every bounce topped below or into stored orders, demand zones only delayed decline. Tactical projection: when future session opens strong into visible overhead supply but cannot hold above it by 10:00 marker, treat midday rebounds as suspect, expect 2pm test to be decisive, favor continuation if late-day demand pockets break in sequence.
